alerts.statusError: Could not load the live status of your plans.
alerts.billingError: Could not load detailed billing profile.

subscriptions.title: Manage subscriptions in Stripe
subscriptions.description: You can view your active subscriptions, update payment methods, change billing details and cancel plans from the Stripe portal.

recentPurchases.title: Recent purchases
recentPurchases.description: Latest invoices and gift purchases tied to your account.

actions.title: Billing actions
actions.description: Jump straight to the places you are most likely to need after checkout.
actions.note: Stripe handles checkout securely. uvirt keeps the resulting invoices, gift links and plan state visible here after the popup flow ends.

invoices.title: Invoices
invoices.description: Open or download your Stripe invoices.

gifts.title: Unclaimed gifts
gifts.description: Gifts you have purchased that are still waiting to be claimed.
gifts.empty: You do not have any unclaimed gifts right now.

emptyState.title: You do not have any Premium licenses
emptyState.description: When you purchase or claim a Premium license, it will appear here so you can assign it to a server.

assignment.title: Premium server assignment
assignment.description: Premium licenses must stay linked to servers. Change the selected server to transfer a license.
assignment.activeLicenses: {count, plural, =1 {Active Premium license} other {Active Premium licenses}}
assignment.licensesDescription: Pick the specific license you want to assign or transfer.
assignment.assignServerDescription: License #{number} can be moved to any manageable server below.
assignment.noServersAvailable: There are no manageable servers available right now.
assignment.note: Each active Premium license must have one server. Selecting a server already assigned to another license transfers it to the currently selected license.

subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
subscriptions.description: View your active subscriptions here. Plan changes, payment methods, renewals and cancellations are managed through the Stripe portal.

premium.title: Server upgrade
premium.description: Manage Premium server licenses and assign active licenses to the servers that should receive perks.

gifts.title: Gift inventory
gifts.description: Recover gift links that have not been claimed yet. Claimed gifts are removed from this inventory.
